articles.title: 'Toy Story 5' Eyes $275M Global Franchise Record Box Office Opening - Deadline
articles.description: 'Toy Story 5' is looking at opening to the best ever for the franchise with a global opening of $275M. In North America, with $140M it will be the best start YTD at box office.

articles.title: Jennifer Lopez Says She Had "Very Little Help" Raising Her and Marc Anthony's Twins - E! Online
articles.description: Jennifer Lopez reflected on her "crazy" motherhood journey as her and ex Marc Anthony's 18-year-old twins Emme and Max graduate high school, sharing that she had "had very little help" in parenting.

articles.title: 5 Zodiac Signs With Very Good Horoscopes On Wednesday, June 17, 2026 - YourTango

articles.description: The axed cast member was speaking to producers behind his co-stars’ backs and giving his opinion on future casting.

articles.title: CBS will pay for Stephen Colbert's Peanuts music licensing gag from Late Show finale — but there's a twist - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: CBS will pay the licensing fee for the use of Vince Guaraldi's 'Linus and Lucy' after Stephen Colbert's house band played the tune on 'The Late Show' finale — but there's a twist.

articles.title: WWE's Danhausen Requests 1-Day Knicks Contract After Uncursing Team En Route to NBA Title - Bleacher Report
articles.description: WWE star Danhausen is requesting a one-day contract from the New York Knicks so he can retire as an NBA champion.

articles.title: 7 things Bunnie Xo said about Jelly Roll in memoir published months before divorce news - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: Months before Jelly Roll filed for divorce from Bunnie Xo, the podcaster detailed her relationship and marriage with the Grammy-winning country star in her memoir 'Stripped Down: Unfiltered and Unapologetic.'

articles.title: Katie Dippold Discusses Her Two-Decade Road to ‘Widow’s Bay’ — and How Its Future Looks - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: As the surprise hit of the spring wraps season one, the creator and showrunner talks about how the project evolved — and what’s next — during its long, long path to Apple TV: ”I really didn't think it was going to sell or get made.”

articles.title: Portlanders take home three James Beard Awards - Oregon Public Broadcasting - OPB
articles.description: Portlanders took some of the culinary world’s highest honors Monday night at the 36th annual James Beard Restaurant and Chef Awards in Chicago. Nodoguro’s Ryan Roadhouse won Best Chef: Northwest & Pacific, while Scotch Lodge won Outstanding Bar.

articles.title: Oliver Tree made eerie comments about his will weeks before fatal helicopter crash in Rio de Janeiro - Fox News
articles.description: Oliver Tree made eerie comments about his will weeks before he was killed when two helicopters collided in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, on Sunday morning.

articles.title: Singer Bonnie Tyler out of a coma but still ‘very unwell,’ her family says - NBC News
articles.description: Raspy-voiced pop singer Bonnie Tyler has emerged from a monthlong coma but continues to be “very unwell” and in intensive care at a hospital in Portugal, her family said in a statement Tuesday

articles.title: Sean Penn to direct Warner Bros. movie about a police officer at the Jan. 6 Capitol riot - AP News
articles.description: Sean Penn will direct a movie about a police officer who was at the Jan. 6 Capitol riot in 2021, Warner Bros. said Tuesday. Following his Oscar-winning performance in “One Battle After Another,” Penn will direct the as-yet-untitled film from his own script. B…
